name: spatMCDA — reference MCDA implementation
workflow_summary: Generic spatial MCDA engine: CRITIC+Entropy+AHP criterion weighting -> continuous + 4-class suitability (terra/sf). NbS-agnostic.
notes: NbS-AGNOSTIC reference MCDA engine (B. Kenduiywo; AGENTS framework primitive). The committed script demos an agroforestry example, but the tool is generic — applies to any NbS. Do NOT read the demo title as an agroforestry association.

name: Agroforestry social-ecological suitability (US Midwest)
workflow_summary: Social-ecological multi-criteria suitability mapping for agroforestry
notes: Accompanies IOP paper 'Mapping the social-ecological suitability of agroforestry in the US Midwest' (10.1088/1748-9326/adab09). GEE variant: saraheb3/AgroforestrySuitability_GEE.

name: Agroforestry Suitability Mapping with iNaturalist
workflow_summary: eta-squared empirical weighting blended with XGBoost/ExtraTrees ML on iNaturalist/GBIF occurrences
notes: Species-occurrence-driven (iNaturalist/GBIF) -> species_envelope flavour; outputs are species, not practice-level.

name: CIFOR-ICRAF SPACIAL Dashboards
workflow_summary: Interactive spatial dashboards for land-use / restoration / agroforestry decision support
notes: CIFOR-ICRAF interactive spatial dashboards. Scope NOT verified as agroforestry-specific (landing page unreachable on probe); ICRAF's agroforestry brand is not evidence the dashboards are agroforestry-scoped (PICOS). Tag left blank pending verification.

name: WRI Atlas of Forest Landscape Restoration Opportunity
workflow_summary: Global/national forest landscape restoration opportunity mapping (methodology + data)
notes: Forest-landscape restoration scope (not pure agroforestry) -> relevant to a future restoration recipe.

name: Restoration Opportunities Assessment Methodology (ROAM)
workflow_summary: Phased restoration opportunity assessment; multi-criteria suitability mapping + stakeholder-defined rules
notes: In stocktake grey-23 (High tier). India ROAM technical note acquired (wri_roam_india) - forest-restoration scope.

name: Diversity for Restoration (D4R)
workflow_summary: Online DSS: habitat-suitability models (present+projected climate) + functional traits + local knowledge -> optimised, complementary species portfolios + seed-zone maps for restoration
notes: Our-org tool (named in TORs). SPECIES-LEVEL (habitat suitability per species, seed sourcing) -> species-envelope realm, not practice-level spatial suitability; keep claim_scope discipline. nbs_ids blank: restoration species selection generally, not a single NbS practice. Sister tool: Diversity for Agroforestry.

name: Diversity for Agroforestry (D4Ag)
workflow_summary: D4R sister tool: tree-species recommendations + planting designs for cacao and coffee agroforestry systems
notes: PICOS-clean: explicitly agroforestry (cacao/coffee AF). Species-level recommendations -> species-envelope; distinct from practice-level suitability. Verify exact URL/scope on review.
